scripts.catalog:fixtures: uv run --project apps/api python -m itam_planner_api.cli ingest-fixtures --fixtures-root apps/api/tests/fixtures --public-data-root public-data
scripts.catalog:live: uv run --project apps/api python -m itam_planner_api.cli ingest-live --public-data-root public-data
scripts.ci:api: uv sync --project apps/api --group dev && pnpm lint:api && pnpm typecheck:api && pnpm test:api && pnpm verify:api:fixtures
scripts.ci:local: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm lint:repo && pnpm ci:api && pnpm ci:local:web:node24 && pnpm ci:local:web:node25
scripts.ci:web: pnpm lint:web && pnpm test:web && pnpm typecheck:web && pnpm build:web
scripts.lint: pnpm lint:repo && pnpm lint:web && pnpm lint:api
scripts.lint:repo:spelling: cspell lint --config cspell.jsonc --gitignore README.md CONTRIBUTING.md AGENTS.md docs/**/*.md apps/**/*.ts apps/**/*.tsx .github/**/*.yml .cursor/rules/*.mdc
scripts.lint:api: uv run --project apps/api --group dev ruff check apps/api
scripts.typecheck:api: uv run --project apps/api --group dev basedpyright apps/api/src
scripts.test: pnpm test:repo && pnpm test:web && pnpm test:api
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm verify:api:fixtures
